description_long: This is a modern, two-story house surrounded by a well-maintained yard and several trees, with a driveway leading to a covered garage. The structure features a mix of flat and slightly sloped roofs, with a combination of white, gray, and black exterior finishes. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property includes a paved walkway and driveway, with the main entrance set back from the street and partially sheltered by an overhang. The landscaping is minimalistic, with trees strategically placed around the perimeter for privacy and visual appeal. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a blend of open and private spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large asymmetrical windows, and a mix of white, gray, and black finishes, surrounded by trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and a row of trees lining the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, large windows, and the garage extending from the main building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area, additional trees, and the back facade with more windows and roof details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side yard, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, minimal steps, and a paved walkway leading from the driveway
